Winamax Poker - Tournament "Edge Case MTT" buyIn: 10€ + 1€ level: 8 - HandId: #777777-01-1111111111 - Holdem no limit (25/100/200) - 2024/03/01 19:00:00 UTC
Table: 'Edge Case MTT(777777)#001' 6-max (real money) Seat #2 is the button
Seat 1: HeroName (3000)
Seat 2: Villain1 (5000)
Seat 4: Villain2 (5000)
Seat 6: Villain3 (5000)
*** ANTE/BLINDS ***
HeroName posts ante 25
Villain1 posts ante 25
Villain2 posts ante 25
Villain3 posts ante 25
Villain2 posts small blind 100
Villain3 posts big blind 200
Dealt to HeroName [Ac Ad]
*** PRE-FLOP ***
HeroName raises 500 to 500
Villain1 raises 1500 to 1500
Villain2 folds
Villain3 folds
HeroName raises 2475 to 2975 and is all-in
Villain1 calls 1475
*** FLOP *** [Ks 7h 2d]
*** TURN *** [Ks 7h 2d][Td]
*** RIVER *** [Ks 7h 2d Td][Jc]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
HeroName shows [Ac Ad]
Villain1 shows [Kh Kd]
Villain1 collected 6350 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 6350 | No Rake
Board: [Ks 7h 2d Td Jc]
Seat 1: HeroName showed [Ac Ad] and lost
Seat 2: Villain1 (button) showed [Kh Kd] and won 6350

Winamax Poker - Tournament "Edge Case MTT" buyIn: 10€ + 1€ level: 1 - HandId: #777777-02-2222222222 - Holdem no limit (10/20) - 2024/03/01 19:05:00 UTC
Table: 'Edge Case MTT(777777)#001' 6-max (real money) Seat #3 is the button
Seat 1: Player1 (5000)
Seat 2: Player2 (5000)
Seat 3: HeroName (5000)
Seat 4: Player4 (5000)
Seat 5: Player5 (5000)
Seat 6: Player6 (5000)
*** ANTE/BLINDS ***
Player4 posts small blind 10
Player5 posts big blind 20
Dealt to HeroName [7s 2d]
*** PRE-FLOP ***
Player6 folds
Player1 folds
Player2 folds
HeroName folds
Player4 folds
*** SHOW DOWN ***
Player5 collected 20 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 20 | No Rake
Seat 5: Player5 (big blind) won 20

Winamax Poker - Tournament "Split Pot" buyIn: 5€ + 0.50€ level: 3 - HandId: #888888-01-3333333333 - Holdem no limit (25/50) - 2024/03/01 20:00:00 UTC
Table: 'Split Pot(888888)#001' 9-max (real money) Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: HeroName (3000)
Seat 2: Villain1 (3000)
Seat 3: Villain2 (3000)
*** ANTE/BLINDS ***
Villain1 posts small blind 25
Villain2 posts big blind 50
Dealt to HeroName [Ah Ks]
*** PRE-FLOP ***
HeroName raises 150 to 150
Villain1 calls 125
Villain2 folds
*** FLOP *** [Qd Jd Td]
Villain1 checks
HeroName bets 200
Villain1 raises 600 to 600
HeroName raises 2850 to 2850 and is all-in
Villain1 calls 2250 and is all-in
*** TURN *** [Qd Jd Td][2c]
*** RIVER *** [Qd Jd Td 2c][3h]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
HeroName shows [Ah Ks]
Villain1 shows [As Kc]
HeroName collected 3050 from pot
Villain1 collected 3050 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 6100 | No Rake
Board: [Qd Jd Td 2c 3h]
Seat 1: HeroName (button) showed [Ah Ks] and won 3050
Seat 2: Villain1 (small blind) showed [As Kc] and won 3050
